what_it_does: It is a ledger metadata record for a design-source image asset named capital-raise/p-04, holding its id, address, channel, path, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, provenance, authorship, creation time, links, and a short source caption.
observations: YAML frontmatter with image ledger fields
MIME type is image/jpeg but width and height are both 0
body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-04.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are 0 despite being an image/jpeg record
Blob reference is present but links array is empty
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed schema of id/address/channel/path/blob/mime/w/h/source/author_session/created/links
Body provides a minimal human-readable caption
concerns: Image dimensions are reported as 0, suggesting missing extraction or an unprocessed asset
No descriptive alt text or content summary for the image
links array is empty, leaving the asset isolated in the ledger
notes: A sparse metadata stub for a design-source JPEG in the capital-raise series, with unresolved zero dimensions and no outgoing links.
questions: Why are width and height 0 for an image/jpeg asset?
What visual content does capital-raise/p-04.jpg contain?
Why does the links array have no entries?
What exactly does design_source_material signify in this context?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to serve as source design ground-truth metadata for an image; the file does that, but the zero dimensions and minimal body mean it is an incomplete image ledger entry.
intention_signals: It appears to be registering a design-source image asset in a ledger so it can be stably addressed by id, URI, and blob reference, likely as a placeholder awaiting dimension extraction or downstream linking.
novelty: The combination of blob-addressed image metadata, explicit 'design ground-truth' caption, and zero dimensions is notable; otherwise it is a conventional asset stub.
contribution: It contributes a stable identifier, address, and blob reference for a specific design-source image, along with provenance fields (author_session, created, source) that a fused system could use to locate, attribute, and contextualize the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter ledger record for the design-source JPEG image capital-raise/p-04, including a blob reference, zero dimensions, authorship, creation timestamp, empty links, and a 'SOURCE design ground-truth' caption.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and make addressable a design-source image asset in the capital-raise series for downstream reference and provenance tracking.
